title: Summer Drop: Ghastlings
body:
Adds Ghastlings and Happy Ghasts from Minecraft Live
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Fvtl6VXzCtE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**(I made this mod in one day btw)**

**Happy Ghast** was announced on **Minecraft LIVE** they are friendly creatures that are rideable and this mod is a recreation of this what was announced on this Live.

First of all to get **Happy Ghast** you need to go to **Soul Sand Vally** in Nether. **There you can find Dried Ghast on soul sand or soul soil.** after putting him to water you wait and then it turns into mob named **Ghastling**. **After feeding Ghastling with 32 snowballs it grows to Happy Ghast.** To ride Happy Ghast you need a **Harness** that can be crafted with 3 leather (on top), 2 glass blocks (on sides) and one wool (in midle). For now in mod the Harness is only in one color, blue. 

**Controls:** WASD - Movement, SPACE - Fly up, LControl - Fly Down. (Thease are default controls, they can be changed in settings.

When you ride Happy Ghast you can notice that he is very slow. **But when you get up from Happy Ghast you can stand on him and he will stand still. Allowing to easy building at heights.**


**Known Bugs or Unimplemented features**
- Currently you can't ride Happy Ghast with more that one player that will be changed in future update.
